Music Experience & Technical
Biography

Daniel, Telematics Engineer and a true Dancefloor artist. Based in Madrid (ESP) but originally from Manizales (COL), he has built a solid career in the electronic music scene since his beginnings in 2011. His sound masterfully blends elements of Minimal, House, Tech and Dance Music, delivering high-energy hybrid sets specially designed for clubs and festivals.

His productions have made a strong impact in Germany, the UK, the Netherlands, Spain and Colombia, reaching the Top 100, Top 10 and Top 5 on Beatport. In 2021, recognized by the Amnesia Ibiza Bootcamp by Aulart, marking the start of his international career.

Warm-up for

Shared the decks warming up for some of the most influential names in the global electronic music scene — from Berghain regulars to Ibiza mainstays and festival headliners.
